title: Synonym expansion dilutes lexical overlap denominator

findingDetails.evidence: scoreTokenOverlap normalizes by max(3, promptTokens.length); scoreLexicalLane (lexical.ts:63,68) feeds it expandedTokens() (original tokens + SYNONYMS). Each injected synonym enlarges promptTokens.length, lowering the per-hit normalized score even when the synonym matches nothing.
findingDetails.why: A prompt that literally names a skill but whose tokens carry many synonyms (e.g. save/context/search each add 3) gets a larger denominator, so the correctly-matching skill is scored lower than it would be without expansion — the opposite of the expansion's recall intent. Can push a true match below downstream thresholds in the live fusion lane.
findingDetails.recommendation: Normalize by the count of the ORIGINAL (pre-synonym) prompt tokens: pass tokenize(prompt) length as the denominator basis while still using expandedTokens for numerator matching, or have scoreTokenOverlap take a separate denominatorCount argument derived from the un-expanded query.
